text.title: growth-paid-acquisition Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for growth-paid-acquisition as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Increasing campaign budget by more than 30% in a single adjustment.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Large budget increases (50%+) trigger the platform learning phase, resetting algorithm optimization and causing temporary CPA spikes.
